policy.scope: Read-only broad reference repositories cloned under references/ for Pokemon GBA hacking tools, assets, emulation, patching, toolchain, and decompilation workflows.
policy.tracking: references/* is ignored; references/manifest.json is the tracked catalog.
policy.pinning: Each entry records the central clone HEAD observed at generatedAt. Historical local pins may be recovered from git history; reference clone roots are now centralized.
policy.centralCorpus: The central /Users/bryan/projects/reference-repos corpus is canonical for reference clones and metadata; references/* entries in this workspace are compatibility aliases to central clone roots, while active repo-root decomp working trees remain in place.
